economic_notes: Investments in Island Falls Forestry LP, Coral Rapids Power Corporation, Bussiere's Quality Meats, Takwata Builders LP, Transmission Infrastructure Partners 1 LP (modified equity). Also investments in Pahquataskkahmekook LP, First Nation Yellow Falls LP (50%), and Kisis Aki Energy Inc (50%) excluded due to unavailable financial info. Agnico Eagle Mines revenue of $3,740,000 suggests significant mining activity in territory.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to: (1) three entities (Pahquataskkahmekook LP, First Nation Yellow Falls LP, Kisis Aki Energy Inc.) excluded from consolidation as no financial information available; (2) comparative statements do not present budget comparison. Also, correction of prior period error relating to Coral Rapids Power's investment in Peter Sutherland Senior Generating Station LP - restated 2022 figures. Debt increased significantly from $20,722,360 to $32,322,857 with $12,549,180 in new debt advances. current_liabilities calculated as accounts payable $1,413,898 + due to funding agencies $826,441 = $2,312,074 (excluding deferred revenue and long-term debt).
